Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 1 180 0}I heard he had a hand in the hidden menu at Hagakure as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 2 181 0}Oh yes, I've heard the same story. They say he tried a bite of some dish.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 3 181 0}Then he said, "It could use some fish flakes." So they put some in, and sure enough, it was delicious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 4 181 0}Now it's an item on our hidden menu. I'm a big fan of it, myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 5 181 0}I had him come up with some ideas for Wakatsu, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 6 182 0}Yes, he's the one. Suemitsu-kun put our coffee on the map, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 7 182 0}Sure, his appearance and behavior are—how should I say this—eccentric...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 8 182 0}But he knows everything about food, and his palate is refined. He's in a league of his own among gourmands.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 9 182 0}There's not a restaurateur around here who doesn't know him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 11 180 0}So when you heard he was planning to leave to tour the country...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 12 182 0}I was shocked and disappointed, of course.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 13 182 0}But I'm glad to hear he's doing well for himself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 14 182 0}I hear he's got a book coming out. It's very exciting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 15 182 0}Even when he's far away, I can still feel him... Aah! Wait, don't run that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 16 180 0}Are the rumors about a "King Suemitsu" statue being built in this shopping district true?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 17 182 0}Hehe. Oh yes, I can't wait. I'll be rubbing it every day for good luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 18 180 0}Oh, are you a student from the area? Do you mind if we get a few words from you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 19 180 0}Are you familiar with the high school student known as the "Gourmet King"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 20 180 0}Oh, your uniform! So he went to Gekkoukan High, then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 21 180 0}Huh? But I'd heard he wasn't interested in anything except food...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 22 180 0}Unless you mean you know him in the same way everyone else around here knows him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 23 180 0}Ah, I see... Maybe he isn't as well-known among the younger crowd?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 24 180 0}Thanks for your time. I'd love a chance to meet him myself one day![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The interview continues...[n]{f 1 1}
